positive: A highly stylized and symmetric cosmic fox silhouette sitting gracefully on a crescent moon. The fox has long, flowing tails and alert, elegant posture. The background is a deep indigo and sapphire nebula, filled with swirling pastel gradients of magenta, cyan, and teal. Incorporate subtle geometric celestial patterns and glowing constellations radiating from behind the fox and moon. The overall aesthetic should be ethereal, mystical, and minimalist, designed with clean lines and stark contrast. Studio quality vector illustration, intricate linework, glowing bioluminescence, high contrast, centered composition, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: text, words, logo, signature, watermark, blur, artifacts, ugly, malformed, cropped, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, noisy, jpeg artifacts, muted colors
